zh.lifeSummary: 當John d'Wasseburne於大約1248年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，他的父親Roger d'Wasseburne11246歲，母親Jonne26歲。他與Isabelle Cassey在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1319年12月25日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆享年72歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾聖 米可艾爾也斯。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John d'Wasseburne was born about 1248, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger d'Wasseburne, was 11246 and his mother, Jonne, was 26. He married Isabelle Cassey in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 25 December 1319, in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in St Michael's, Worcestershire, England.

fr.Stanford Wasseburne, Worcestershire, Eng: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John d'Wasseburne est né environ 1248, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger d'Wasseburne, avait 11246 ans et sa mère, Jonne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle Cassey à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1319, à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à St Michael's, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.Stanford Wasseburne, Worcestershire, Eng: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John d'Wasseburne um 1248 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger d'Wasseburne 11246 und seine Mutter Jonne 26. Er hat in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Isabelle Cassey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1319 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Michael's, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.Stanford Wasseburne, Worcestershire, Eng: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando John d'Wasseburne è nato il circa 1248 nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger d'Wasseburne, aveva 11246 anni e il suo madre, Jonne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle Cassey nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 25 dicembre 1319, nel Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a St Michael's, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John d'Wasseburneが約1248年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger d'Wasseburneは11246歳，母Jonneは26歳であった。イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでIsabelle Casseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1319年12月25日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで72歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスト ミチャエル'スにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John d'Wasseburne(이)가 대략 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger d'Wasseburne(은)는 11246세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Isabelle Cassey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1319년 12월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 스트 믹하얼'스에 묻혔다.

pt.Stanford Wasseburne, Worcestershire, Eng: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John d'Wasseburne nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger d'Wasseburne, tinha 11246 anos e sua mãe, Jonne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle Cassey em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1319, em Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em St Michael's, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Stanford Wasseburne, Worcestershire, Eng: Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Stanford Wasseburne, Worcestershire, Eng: станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John d'Wasseburne родился около 1248 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger d'Wasseburne было 11246 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle Cassey в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 25 декабря 1319 г. в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел'с, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John d'Wasseburne nació aproximadamente 1248, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger d'Wasseburne, tenía 11246 años y su mamá, Jonne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Isabelle Cassey en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1319, en Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en St Michael's, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
